title: New Multi-Year Sponsorship
html:
<h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 font-exo">DeHub Announces Multi-Year Sponsorship with North Wales Crusaders</h2> <p class="mb-4 text-lg text-royal-blue/80">We're delighted to reveal a multi-year sponsorship agreement with the only Rugby League club in Wales, The North Wales Crusaders.</p> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">Rugby is the most participated sport in the country, with the Encyclopedia of Wales stating that the sport is "seen by many as a symbol of Welsh identity and an expression of national consciousness" 😲.</p>

<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mt-8 mb-4 font-exo">What this partnership means</h3> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">As part of our commitment, DeHub has secured the following for every home game across the next two seasons:</p> <ul class="list-disc list-inside space-y-3 my-4 text-royal-blue/80 pl-4"> <li>The official match ball sponsorship.</li> <li>An advertising board in the stadium.</li> <li>The "Man of the Match" award will be presented as the "DeHub Man of the Match".</li> </ul>

<p class="mt-8 font-semibold text-royal-blue">Stay tuned for more details on how we're reaching their 15,000 capacity stadium full of fans on a weekly basis!</p>
md:
DeHub Announces Multi-Year Sponsorship with North Wales Crusaders

We're delighted to reveal a multi-year sponsorship agreement with the only Rugby League club in Wales, The North Wales Crusaders.

Rugby is the most participated sport in the country, with the Encyclopedia of Wales stating that the sport is "seen by many as a symbol of Welsh identity and an expression of national consciousness" 😲.

What this partnership means

As part of our commitment, DeHub has secured the following for every home game across the next two seasons:

  • The official match ball sponsorship.
  • An advertising board in the stadium.
  • The "Man of the Match" award will be presented as the "DeHub Man of the Match".

Stay tuned for more details on how we're reaching their 15,000 capacity stadium full of fans on a weekly basis!
